landing.title: A.DreamMaker PPT Maker
landing.lede: Edit host-AI-made 16:9 HTML slides locally, reduce repeat correction prompts, and hand the current work back for honest PDF/PPTX creation.

sections.modesTitle: Assistant is default. Auto is optional.
sections.assistantTitle: Fix small things before asking AI again.
sections.assistantCopy: Text, position, size, and alignment changes happen in the local workbench so host AI can focus on generation and bigger direction decisions.
sections.editorTitle: The fixed canvas is the product center.
sections.editorCopy: The 16:9 HTML slide stays dominant on PC screens while the slide rail and inspector support editing without taking over.
sections.exportCopy: PPT Maker prepares the current edited state. It shows final PDF/PPTX completion only when a real host-AI result exists.
sections.privacyTitle: Reuse slide style, not private slide content.
sections.privacyCopy: Reference Design Library is aimed at design-only recipes extracted by local host AI. Original files, detailed slide content, and private paths are not product-server storage targets.
sections.oauthTitle: Google signup is preview-only for now.
sections.oauthCopy: The button and account surface show the intended path, but real OAuth and payment are shown as inactive until connected.
sections.boundaryCopy: Free viewer links carry attribution; Paid viewer links are watermark-free. Viewer links are not editors.
sections.stackTitle: Login, payment, and deployment are not connected yet.
sections.accountCopy: Account, free credits, referral, paid fair-use entitlement, sharing, and memory structure are present without login or payment.
sections.adminCopy: Admin route evidence and mutation boundaries remain in the local operator console, not on this public surface.

plans.title: Start with Free and one Paid plan.
plans.copy: Free centers on limited credits and viewer attribution. Paid opens practical editing, Style Memory, design reuse, and watermark-free viewer sharing. Payment is not attached yet.

faq.title: The boundary should be clear before launch.
faq.q1: Does PPT Maker author with its own AI?
faq.a1: No. Host AI owns writing and direction. PPT Maker owns editing, validation, handoff, and account boundaries.
faq.q2: Does Export immediately download a file?
faq.a2: No. It never appears final unless a real host-AI result reference exists.
faq.q3: Does Paid keep charging visible credits per edit?
faq.a3: No. Normal paid editing should avoid visible per-edit credit accounting. Internal fair-use guards can still prevent abuse.

valueLabels.no_visible_per_edit_credit_for_normal_wo: no visible per-edit credits for normal workflows

account.title: Account dashboard placeholder
account.lede: This local surface shows the shape of Free/Paid account status without implementing login, payment, subscription mutation, or hosted dashboard sync.
account.billingCopy: Payment is not attached. Checkout, subscription edits, invoices, and billing portal links are intentionally absent.
account.entitlementCopy: Free is limited-credit, watermarked viewer, and preview-oriented. Paid opens the practical editor, Style Memory, Reference Design Library, and watermark-free viewer sharing.
account.authCopy: This placeholder reserves space for authenticated account records without creating a login flow.
account.adminCopy: Admin mutation evidence is not displayed in the user-facing account entry.

footer.copy: Local static MVP surface. Payment and hosted generation are not attached.
